7420002.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
7420002.transcript: If I were a catalyst, where would I hide?

8641737.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
8641737.transcript: Hah! I could do this all day!

10279421.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
10279421.transcript: Must be desperate to sic toys on us!

10924277.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
10924277.transcript: Gotta hand it to the man! He knows what he wants in life!

11648566.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
11648566.transcript: This one's for all the marbles!

17730894.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
17730894.transcript: See if you can survive this!

19749749.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
19749749.transcript: Sure would hate to be caught under that fist!

26323597.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
26323597.transcript: Always nice to have a helping hand!

30286419.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
30286419.transcript: Gallopin' guppies! You're way ahead of the pack!

34910708.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
34910708.transcript: You aren't the most eloquent, are you, shuddy?

35289453.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
35289453.transcript: Don't tell me you young'uns are tuckered out already!

35767951.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
35767951.transcript: Shucks, sonny! You know how to make an old fart blush!

39149612.label: PL1300_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_4
39149612.transcript: I'm itching to get back out there!

39867212.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
39867212.transcript: We're bustin' through whether ya like it or not!

45471381.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
45471381.transcript: My poor blade is frozen stiff! Gotta shake off the frost!

45890613.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
45890613.transcript: Astral's are a force to be reckoned with!

50178387.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
50178387.transcript: So much easier to bait a hook when the worm's big and fat!

58478059.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
58478059.transcript: Ugh! This dust is murder on me nose!

68780184.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
68780184.transcript: I've seen my share of ugly, but this place takes the cake!

74287791.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
74287791.transcript: Can't kick the bucket before rescuing the kiddo!

75678514.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
75678514.transcript: Don't blink or you'll miss the fireworks!

77594694.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
77594694.transcript: Looks like clear skies from here on out.

77812810.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
77812810.transcript: Curtain call's closing in! I can feel it!

79986306.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
79986306.transcript: Am I what you young folk would call hardcore?

87995430.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_enemy_break_reaction_C
87995430.transcript: Oh, I'll give 'em their just desserts!

89123420.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
89123420.transcript: You sure know your way around swords!

90481078.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
90481078.transcript: Got it! I'll keep a watchful eye out!

103542811.label: PL1300_vo_ATK_ability_4_3
103542811.transcript: Now you're in the deep end!

111235691.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
111235691.transcript: I don't like this one iota! What choice do we have?

112858257.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
112858257.transcript: What's with you, Eugen? Been going to etiquette class?

113409589.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
113409589.transcript: You folks ain't very nice! You know that?

116759096.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
116759096.transcript: Ain't been this spry in years!

126810354.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
126810354.transcript: Did all these old bones could do to keep up with ya!

131047475.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_lockon_5
131047475.transcript: An old badger still has claws!

139425995.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
139425995.transcript: We sure showed the young folk a thing or two!

140009918.label: PL1300_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_2
140009918.transcript: Come on! You're missing all the fun!

142403507.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
142403507.transcript: You've found your own style, son! That's all you need!

149819967.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
149819967.transcript: Just keep a clear head and wait for victory to come a-biting!

156004459.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
156004459.transcript: Tranquil as a forest pond, you are.

159363964.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
159363964.transcript: Don't let that weapon suck your soul dry!

160543718.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
160543718.transcript: Bait your rod with diligence, and you'll catch victory.

163212568.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
163212568.transcript: This freakish cold is hell on my knees!

164349131.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
164349131.transcript: Like a hot knife through butter!

167775310.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
167775310.transcript: Oh boy, they're cookin' somethin' foul!

168358024.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
168358024.transcript: Stop it! You're making me wanna show off!

169203037.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
169203037.transcript: Ha! Still in my golden years!

182186683.label: PL1300_vo_ATK_charge_line_1
182186683.transcript: Let me show you how it's done!

187561123.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
187561123.transcript: Aye! Danger lurks around every corner!

197538715.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
197538715.transcript: Couldn't get enough of us, eh? Too bad the feeling ain't mutual!

197962179.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
197962179.transcript: We move so fast, it's not even funny!

198753298.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
198753298.transcript: Got nothing but respect for your swordplay!

199423969.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
199423969.transcript: We'd better bring out the big guns against two generals!

209815617.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
209815617.transcript: Use them keen eyes and learn you a thing or two, sonny!

210900163.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
210900163.transcript: Well, I ain't rusted with age, have I?

212529017.label: PL1300_vo_DMG_down_2
212529017.transcript: Can't beat Father Time, can ya?

215076413.label: PL1300_vo_SP_charge_name_A_3
215076413.transcript: And none shall escape the cover of a shroud!

216573901.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
216573901.transcript: Well, no one said takin' on an army would be easy!

217573714.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_weakpoint
217573714.transcript: Live by the rod, die by the sword!

218387652.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
218387652.transcript: Last one to the top is a rotten egg!

222060241.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
222060241.transcript: Well, aren't you a fine gunman!

223190099.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
223190099.transcript: Found a wee crybaby over here!

224681892.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_2
224681892.transcript: Feel the wind in your sails!

224711014.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
224711014.transcript: Quit bouncing around! You're trying to turn my hairs gray!

234579253.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
234579253.transcript: You're nothing to sneeze at yourself, missy!

235280577.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
235280577.transcript: Channel that rage! And kick his behind!

239794132.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
239794132.transcript: And that was some good support!

242427070.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
242427070.transcript: Hah! My steel cuts through anything!

244566694.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
244566694.transcript: Ooh! I should take you spearfishing!

246181613.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
246181613.transcript: See here? The sword and the rod share fundamentals!

246960099.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
246960099.transcript: This is no time to dilly-dally!

247071821.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
247071821.transcript: Who says gods can't be diced?

262745299.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
262745299.transcript: Hang in there, lad! We'll get you out of there!

266143773.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
266143773.transcript: No kiddin'! How's about we go another round?

271935430.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
271935430.transcript: Don't rest yet! We still gotta put you through your paces!

273784936.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
273784936.transcript: Oops! Got a little lost in the moment!

275524306.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
275524306.transcript: Move it, pooch! Go chase your own tail instead of ours!

281276800.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
281276800.transcript: Oh, I felt that one in my bones!

282391135.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
282391135.transcript: Every foe has a tell. So keep them peepers peeled!

286417019.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
286417019.transcript: You're scintillating with the sword, ma'am!

286798486.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
286798486.transcript: This crew just can't be beat!

289540400.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
289540400.transcript: What? You thought I couldn't handle a spear?

290687011.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
290687011.transcript: Bah! Machines have no art to their warcraft!

310129485.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
310129485.transcript: Try this slash on for size!

318965352.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
318965352.transcript: Haven't you heard? I can even cut through steel!

323112526.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
323112526.transcript: Best to gird your loins, folks!

326673398.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
326673398.transcript: Lot of potential in that play of yours!

337547718.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_lockon_3
337547718.transcript: Draw them weapons! We got bogeys!

342873554.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_box_check_l_3
342873554.transcript: Havin' me a whale of a day!

347983637.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
347983637.transcript: You spring chickens can't outspring me!

353074700.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_box_check_l_2
353074700.transcript: Ha ha! Now this is a nice catch!

354919475.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
354919475.transcript: Next up, we better uh... you know the drill.

355542505.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_pic_line_3
355542505.transcript: Little field kelp never hurt nobody!

362345366.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
362345366.transcript: Yep! That was a whale of a wallop!

365322575.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
365322575.transcript: I'll retire when I'm well and ready!

367931591.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
367931591.transcript: You and those pups got your own language!

372200255.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
372200255.transcript: The ward never ends, does she?

374078160.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
374078160.transcript: With aim like that, you must eat your carrots!

376581364.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
376581364.transcript: Ooh-wee! We got ourselves a real dust-up goin'!

397168427.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
397168427.transcript: Roger! Can't get caught on the back foot!

399134073.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
399134073.transcript: Ha! All that work's got me tuckered out!

416913468.label: PL1300_vo_DUO_rescue1_B
416913468.transcript: This ain't the time to be throwin' in the towel!

420626263.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
420626263.transcript: You got fire in ya, sonny!

425158712.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
425158712.transcript: Keep up that fervor! Channel it into your attacks!

425523519.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B
425523519.transcript: Bless me, buckle! That was brilliant!

427236851.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
427236851.transcript: What's got you all slack-jawed, sonny?

437994189.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
437994189.transcript: You can't hope to match our teamwork!

441602285.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
441602285.transcript: Death by a thousand cuts ain't fast, but it works!

446423365.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
446423365.transcript: We'll have 'em wrapped up by supper!

452183058.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
452183058.transcript: Now I know what an ant feels like!

459004070.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
459004070.transcript: Ha! You young folks think you're invincible!

460784925.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
460784925.transcript: Abandon your fear, kiddos! Show that lizard who's boss!

463517975.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_lockon_1
463517975.transcript: Guess I haven't had me a good roll for a while!

466823720.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
466823720.transcript: Sure thing, m'lady! They'll never see it comin'!

475241848.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
475241848.transcript: Hooked ourselves a real lunker this time!

476224698.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
476224698.transcript: Uh-uh. Keep your peepers locked on your surroundings!

479451607.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_congrats_2
479451607.transcript: Oh, got tears in me eyes!

483957143.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
483957143.transcript: Oh boy! I'm ready to get down to the bond!

484658807.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
484658807.transcript: That scythe is gonna be more trouble than it's worth!

495819540.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
495819540.transcript: Look at you, keeping up with my zip zip zapping!

500952379.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
500952379.transcript: Soon as you see an opening, take it!

503231519.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
503231519.transcript: After this general goes down, we'll be three for three!

507727219.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
507727219.transcript: People are like wine, missy. They deepen and complexify with age.

516161171.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
516161171.transcript: I'm no gate expert, but seems to me this one oughta stay shut!

517154227.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
517154227.transcript: Just keepin' ya on your toes!

518473402.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
518473402.transcript: Then let's send 'em blubberin' back home!

521324117.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
521324117.transcript: Hah! All that work's got me tuckered out!

525224327.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
525224327.transcript: Don't put that scythe away! We still got fish to fry!

525353335.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
525353335.transcript: Not bad for an old fisherman, eh?

537828376.label: PL1300_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL1700
537828376.transcript: About time we change the tide!

541477341.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
541477341.transcript: Nurturing the young folk! Ain't that what it's all about?

543057502.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
543057502.transcript: Now I'm tempted to take a nap and let you handle things.

548538646.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
548538646.transcript: I'll keep my toes with shoes.

549310110.label: PL1300_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
549310110.transcript: A warrior hones his art over years and years of battle!

556214204.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
556214204.transcript: Move it or lose it, folks!

560210247.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
560210247.transcript: You're not afraid to get into the thick of it!

562428630.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
562428630.transcript: I sense limitless power in you, Rosetta!

567428353.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
567428353.transcript: Crawl back into the hole you came from!

575078474.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
575078474.transcript: We don't got time to be chewin' the fat, shunny!

577166167.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
577166167.transcript: Whether it's the bayou or the battlefield, patience is key.

578273524.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
578273524.transcript: Couldn't have done it without ya!

584674632.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
584674632.transcript: Feels good to be in with the young folk!

593504301.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
593504301.transcript: Well, I do cast a large net!

595568770.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
595568770.transcript: With our speed, this'll be over before you can cry "Help! There's a troll combing my mustache!"

607633024.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
607633024.transcript: You got a lot riding on that sword, don't you, missy?

610862111.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A
610862111.transcript: Quit trying to butter me up!

613789737.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
613789737.transcript: Hah! Ha! Ho! That's enough for today!

621399245.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
621399245.transcript: Step to it! We got more comin'!

628869776.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
628869776.transcript: Sure thing, bub! Who we fishin' up?

632566917.label: PL1300_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_3
632566917.transcript: Who's ready for some cold-blooded revenge?

635815551.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
635815551.transcript: Think we'd better nip this one in the bud!

636485168.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
636485168.transcript: It's smooth sailing with you guys!

640559038.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
640559038.transcript: Don't worry about me! I'm not shinin' out yet!

649232620.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
649232620.transcript: Took the words right out of my pie hole!

650703744.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
650703744.transcript: We really opened a can of worms, didn't we?

652229686.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
652229686.transcript: Ha! Wait a minute... it's over?

654050469.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_call_3
654050469.transcript: Gather 'round, friends! I found the way!

667352797.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
667352797.transcript: Look, it takes finesse to tango with Twinblade.

671400130.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
671400130.transcript: My gears are spinning triple time!

676425718.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
676425718.transcript: I love a good group attack!

717705222.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
717705222.transcript: It's rude to interrupt a lady!

721548271.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
721548271.transcript: Sheesh! Can't we stop and smell the roses?

721742581.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
721742581.transcript: These guys mean business! Just look at them matching outfits!

723519867.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
723519867.transcript: Curious skill you got there, lass. Mind if I put it to the test?

724430483.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
724430483.transcript: Never thought I'd get to feel this young again!

726291200.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_2chain
726291200.transcript: Don't let this old coot outpace ya!

727698490.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
727698490.transcript: You saw that coming, didn't you?

738103726.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
738103726.transcript: No need to get fancy. We already know how to hack this beast.

743622776.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
743622776.transcript: But with you, missy, all bets are off!

748756927.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_call_1
748756927.transcript: What are you floundering for? Over here!

751056677.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
751056677.transcript: You're more bullheaded than a dang stampede!

756438710.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
756438710.transcript: You were this close to gutting me with that spell!

758133103.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
758133103.transcript: Joe! Who's ready to shove off?

758964114.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
758964114.transcript: Come on! We ain't reached safe port yet!

761590932.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
761590932.transcript: Alrighty! We finally got to the heart of the matter!

762628414.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
762628414.transcript: Can't get a cut in edgewise!

765938060.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
765938060.transcript: Heh! What a little overboard, did we?

769892537.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_get_snp_1
769892537.transcript: Crab a hoy! And in such a funny place too!

776940633.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
776940633.transcript: Hah! Remember now! Pride leads to folly!

787468267.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
787468267.transcript: That calculating look in Lilith's eyes... she had it too.

801506692.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
801506692.transcript: Sometimes all you can do is show 'em tough love!

804866269.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
804866269.transcript: Don't rest on them laurels, people!

811589513.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
811589513.transcript: Finally! Someone who can take a punch!

812550196.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
812550196.transcript: You've got an overactive imagination, Mishy!

814692568.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
814692568.transcript: Now that's a real honor coming from a spry martial artist such as yourself!

816365055.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_call_2
816365055.transcript: Come on, you scrubs! Move it!

819613172.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_thanks_3
819613172.transcript: What would I do without you?

820591867.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
820591867.transcript: Gave him some heat on that one!

824113392.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
824113392.transcript: Hey! Having the right muse puts wind in my sails!

827314791.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
827314791.transcript: Guess this old conjurer's still got it!

831590365.label: PL1300_vo_ETC_lockon_4
831590365.transcript: I needed to stretch my short arm!

835888762.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1
835888762.transcript: Out of the frying pan and into the fire!

843774493.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
843774493.transcript: And know not if we dreamt of a butterfly, or if a butterfly dreamt of us.

850596070.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
850596070.transcript: What, impressive? Look in a mirror, missy!

853567708.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
853567708.transcript: So, just how fast can ya go?

860016691.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
860016691.transcript: Be a good horsey and quit buckin' around!

860336731.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
860336731.transcript: Save the high-fives for after we knock this monster down!

862166754.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_2
862166754.transcript: Get to the back line, young'un!

874646255.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
874646255.transcript: Hah! Give a fisherman a sword, why don't ya?

876895750.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
876895750.transcript: I'll clip your ambition before it kills us all!

878584292.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
878584292.transcript: Fear not, younglings! Grandpa's got your back!

882076901.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_call_emergency_1
882076901.transcript: Let's make like a bakery and haul buns!

887160044.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
887160044.transcript: There we go! Keep 'em on his heels!

898677532.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
898677532.transcript: Slice 'em, dice 'em, and kick their keister!

904493549.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
904493549.transcript: Need me to slow things down?

924898791.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
924898791.transcript: Like what you didn't see, huh?

930609965.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_3
930609965.transcript: Why'd ya let yourself get hit for!

930690764.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
930690764.transcript: Hah! Grandpa's got a sword arm, don't he!

931171928.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
931171928.transcript: Ain't never let a catch slip away!

933485996.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
933485996.transcript: Trust in your training and go for the gusto!

935635722.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
935635722.transcript: Take some swipes and see what sticks!

935636871.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
935636871.transcript: Nah, you did well. Remind me to learn you the sword, eh?

937333169.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_throw_dispel_reaction_1
937333169.transcript: Not how you expected this to go, eh, bub?

952162313.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
952162313.transcript: Angling for a successor is harder than deep-sea fishing.

956963082.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_enemy_crush_parts_2
956963082.transcript: We broke that sucker clean off!

967673941.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_B
967673941.transcript: Hohoho! We're gonna topple this bad boy!

968718752.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
968718752.transcript: I was thinkin' the same thing!

970565508.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
970565508.transcript: As long as we're breathing, we all got room to grow!

973157986.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
973157986.transcript: Ho boy! I'm ready to get down to the pond!

974844848.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
974844848.transcript: That one made my hair stand on end!

980751577.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
980751577.transcript: Let me show you how I make mincemeat out of the wind!

988674577.label: PL1300_vo_MOV_wait_cold_1
988674577.transcript: Hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo... hoo

991163004.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
991163004.transcript: You know what I think? Getting lost is the journey!

991207139.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
991207139.transcript: There's some things only age can teach ya, eh?

1003326651.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
1003326651.transcript: What? I don't take no stock in your newfangled science!

1008544813.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1200
1008544813.transcript: You holy knights are no joke!

1008661147.label: PL1300_vo_DMG_rise_5
1008661147.transcript: They caught me on the back foot!

1011293769.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
1011293769.transcript: You do some dazzling displays yourself, missy!

1020635903.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
1020635903.transcript: Quiet the mind... and then you can part oceans.

1029715576.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
1029715576.transcript: Hit him hard with a big old blast!

1030536979.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
1030536979.transcript: Woo-ee! Somebody get this young man on a stage!

1030964905.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
1030964905.transcript: What say we go on rocking the boat?

1032444485.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
1032444485.transcript: Don't wait to attack! Go and swing it!

1038694661.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
1038694661.transcript: I call it the Dartfish style! Wanna learn?

1052817723.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_3
1052817723.transcript: Hmm. Who else is feeling refreshed?

1060130627.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
1060130627.transcript: Something 'bout this island rubs me the wrong way!

1062825511.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
1062825511.transcript: No, no, don't you get all worried about me!

1068128574.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0700
1068128574.transcript: Ha! Not every day a half-living ghost calls YOU magic!

1068322837.label: PL1300_vo_NAV_get_snp_3
1068322837.transcript: Time to come home, Mr. Crab!

11935606.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
11935606.transcript: You finally get over your hang-ups, boyo!

17511693.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
17511693.transcript: So is your brute strength. But what else is new?

18001738.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
18001738.transcript: Seems like the deeper the water, the stronger your sword!

32865596.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
32865596.transcript: Says the pup who's not even panting!

43164464.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
43164464.transcript: Your every move is like a work of art!

65960479.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
65960479.transcript: You needn't worry about me, Lash. I'm a slippery fella.

79386933.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
79386933.transcript: Off with the training wheels! Here comes the real speed!

90963665.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
90963665.transcript: Gotta keep up with you kids!

94141350.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
94141350.transcript: You remind me of a wolf on the brink of starvation.

179121962.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
179121962.transcript: A one-man army with a lot of help! Thanks for lighting 'em up!

180540933.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
180540933.transcript: Heh heh! Ain't nothing compared to you angels!

182437193.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
182437193.transcript: Mmm, lot o' juice hidin' in that gun o' yours!

201010264.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
201010264.transcript: Hmm. Maybe a little socializing would do you some good.

201695274.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
201695274.transcript: Hoo-hoo-wee! There ain't any times you do, miss!

215539455.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
215539455.transcript: Key is to do somethin' and never stop. Oh, and stretchin'!

253733498.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
253733498.transcript: Amazing you youngins never get tired!

259185411.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
259185411.transcript: Hehehe, sorry if I spooked ya!

278724374.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
278724374.transcript: Thank me after we've all made it safely back home.

280086871.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
280086871.transcript: Have some faith! You'll be there in no time!

290911067.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
290911067.transcript: Hmph. Your well of power runs deep. But how deep?

325312054.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
325312054.transcript: The body may weaken with age, but the mind and hand just keep getting more refined!

351535613.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
351535613.transcript: To be in the throes of youth! Wish I still had an appetite like you!

364833488.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
364833488.transcript: Seems our foes are none too impressed, though.

379598714.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
379598714.transcript: Nothin' like shootin' fish in a barrel, eh, Cutie Boy?

380163796.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
380163796.transcript: Not gonna let this old fart run laps around ya, are ya?

403607955.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
403607955.transcript: Yep! That's a show of deadly force alright!

430980994.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
430980994.transcript: You mess with Fediel the Black, and she'll really put you to sleep!

457174564.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
457174564.transcript: Your attention to detail makes coordination a breeze.

475109559.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
475109559.transcript: Kehehe! Raining ghosts and dogs it was!

493154023.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
493154023.transcript: Hehe, and the forecast just keeps lookin' better and better!

495650892.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
495650892.transcript: Ho ho! Got ourselves a star in the making!

504632949.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
504632949.transcript: Go on and make me blush, why don't ya?

508162732.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
508162732.transcript: Hehehe! You'll never miss a beat, will ya, lass?

524468878.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
524468878.transcript: Heh! Let that one slip through me fingers!

528883114.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
528883114.transcript: The youths of today look to us to mold them into leaders.

529256687.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
529256687.transcript: Hehehe, pair of us sure gave him what for, eh, sonny?

548073980.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
548073980.transcript: Lost sight of your katana back there! Now that's speed!

549441274.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
549441274.transcript: Thin line between life and death, eh?

560301976.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
560301976.transcript: Dang 'em! Them fancy schmick stridin' powers sure are nutty!

562089231.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
562089231.transcript: I will drag the rest to the darkest depths!

563971706.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
563971706.transcript: Ha! Actually, I wouldn't mind having a break myself!

566597174.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
566597174.transcript: We showed 'em not to count the small folk out!

599654160.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
599654160.transcript: Like watchin' leaves fall. Uh... sharp, deadly leaves.

607904728.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
607904728.transcript: I'm no spring chicken. Need a quick nap.

608962876.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
608962876.transcript: I like your moxie, kid! All right! The race is on!

624636234.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
624636234.transcript: It was a fun little challenge!

660560056.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
660560056.transcript: At my age, you let the past stay in the past.

668974221.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
668974221.transcript: Can't let your bullets hog all the glory!

672680077.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
672680077.transcript: You got passion beyond your years. What drives you, sonny?

679505439.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
679505439.transcript: So that blade's your partner, eh? Here's hoping neither of you strays from the right path.

681112659.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
681112659.transcript: Heh heh! Learn yourself something, did ya?

694806046.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
694806046.transcript: Oh shucks! Got a lucky hit in! Like a stray bullet!

700912029.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
700912029.transcript: Oh, you really put the art in martial artist, missy!

709076880.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
709076880.transcript: Just need to get the technique down. Now watch closely!

714309264.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
714309264.transcript: You ain't gettin' winded, are ya, sonny?

723376855.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
723376855.transcript: Now to cross off 'Chum with an eternal' from the bucket list!

726717170.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
726717170.transcript: Hey! I'm as shocked as you are!

730478075.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
730478075.transcript: Hold on, missy! It was too short!

790554615.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
790554615.transcript: Hmm. Reckon I must've laid it on a bit thick.

821576140.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
821576140.transcript: Guess that's what they mean by every rose has her thorn!

822177690.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
822177690.transcript: Learned a thing or two from gutting fish!

829449009.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
829449009.transcript: Nice catch! For a rising angler!

838968565.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
838968565.transcript: Heh heh! And there's more where that came from!

844213002.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
844213002.transcript: Takes patience, focus, and one heck of a hot foot!

845095567.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
845095567.transcript: Very well! Behold! My most sacred dance!

850605111.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
850605111.transcript: Watching you youngsters go to work always puts a spring in my step!

863457042.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
863457042.transcript: And so the teacher becomes the student!

873409748.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
873409748.transcript: Nice shooting! But a tad slow!

901170287.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
901170287.transcript: Let's see you follow this next cadence!

904525515.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
904525515.transcript: Dang, you noticed! Means I'm gettin' rusty!

907070522.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
907070522.transcript: We sure sang a tune with that duet!

908289312.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
908289312.transcript: Like two spring chickens in lockstep!

918657800.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
918657800.transcript: You live long enough, and I guess you see legends come true.

939666864.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
939666864.transcript: I don't know about no dyad, but these swords sure are my comrades!

944256508.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
944256508.transcript: You're not so bad yourself, little lady!

975691794.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
975691794.transcript: Sometimes life's journey takes you down unexpected roads.

998402628.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
998402628.transcript: But I know you'll only get better and better!

1016662583.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
1016662583.transcript: Looks like we made another huge splash, didn't we?

1020816403.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
1020816403.transcript: Well, shave my whiskers! You've gotten quicker!

1034063489.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
1034063489.transcript: Oh, dead son of dogfish! That was one fast shot! You were quicker than lightning!

1040434659.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0100
1040434659.transcript: Hoo-ee! Talk about a home dinger!

1061663586.label: PL1300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
1061663586.transcript: Jumpin' jellyfish man! Is your power not enough for ya?

80757325.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
80757325.transcript: Sure do! There are few with eyes fast enough to keep up with me!

208299657.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
208299657.transcript: Wait a minute, sonny! I don't appreciate lollygaggers!

269588130.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
269588130.transcript: Stomped 'em silly, didn't we? Heh heh!

340150707.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
340150707.transcript: You can say that again, missy!

385849284.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
385849284.transcript: Buckle up! The real fight's just getting started!

431370323.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
431370323.transcript: Reflexes, focus, fortitude. You're basically the perfect ally!

583756219.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
583756219.transcript: You know what they say? Float like a jellyfish, sting like a bigger jellyfish!

710649558.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
710649558.transcript: Now that's a real honor, considering he's a master of swordcraft!

808581470.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
808581470.transcript: Heh heh! All these small fry must be boring for a gal like you!

828590453.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
828590453.transcript: No problem! I needed a warm-up for my sword arm! Hehe!

863748469.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
863748469.transcript: Nice follow-up, sonny! I see why you're the best!

885837874.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
885837874.transcript: Well, someone's got some pep in their step!

1042398088.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
1042398088.transcript: Why abs? One, two, three, four, five, six. Never again.

1045470069.label: PL1300_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
1045470069.transcript: One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six! Ha ha!

369273085.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
369273085.transcript: Hehehe, they don't call me the Phantom Fisher for nothing!

385006718.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
385006718.transcript: Mmm. Nah. I was way more spry when I was a tadpole!

678065312.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
678065312.transcript: The brave never waver, but the wise always find their way!

779473081.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
779473081.transcript: Give it up for the supreme Primark!

780345106.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
780345106.transcript: No miracles about it, bub! It was all hard work!

1058367431.label: PL1300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
1058367431.transcript: Oh yeah! We gave 'em what for!
